market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00
Median 90-day occupancy: 28.3%

title_variants: Scenic Ilkley Cottage – Book Your River Retreat
analysis.rewritten_desc: Welcome to Wharfe View Cottage, a charming entire‑home retreat nestled in Ilkley with breathtaking views over the River Wharfe. The cottage comfortably sleeps up to four guests across two cozy bedrooms, each equipped with premium linens. The open‑plan living area opens onto a large picture‑window framing the river, perfect for morning coffee or evening relaxation. A fully stocked kitchen provides everything needed to prepare home‑cooked meals, and a modern bathroom offers a spacious shower. Guests enjoy a spotless, 4.98‑rated stay backed by 63 glowing reviews. Located within walking distance of Ilkley’s village centre, boutique shops, cafés and scenic walking routes, the cottage is ideal for couples, families or small groups seeking a peaceful countryside escape. At £240 per night, you receive a premium experience with high‑speed Wi‑Fi, fresh towels, and personalized local tips from host Mischelle. The property is currently booked 42.4% of the next 90 days, leaving ample opportunity for new guests to discover this high‑rated hideaway. Whether you’re exploring the Yorkshire Dales, cycling along the river path, or simply unwinding in a serene setting, Wharfe View Cottage offers comfort, style, and unforgettable river vistas. The cottage is a short 10‑minute stroll to the historic Ilkley Manor Museum and the famous Cow and Calf rock formations, and only a 5‑minute drive to the bustling Bradford Canal for waterside dining. After a day of exploring, return to your private garden terrace where you can enjoy a barbecue or simply soak in the sunset over the river.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a high‑quality image of the river view from the living room as the cover photo, as it showcases the property’s unique selling point and invites clicks.
key_diagnosis: Reduce the nightly rate from £240 (37% above the Ilkley median of £175) to improve the 42.4% 90‑day occupancy, which is lower than the potential demand at market‑aligned pricing.
Add and list high‑value amenities – outdoor garden/terrace, guaranteed on‑site parking, and entertainment options – to match guest expectations and increase appeal.
Upload a full photo set (at least 12 images) covering each bedroom, kitchen, bathroom, living area, and outdoor view; prioritize the river view as the lead image to boost click‑through rates.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your cottage charges £240/night – 37% higher than Ilkley’s median £175 – yet its 90‑day occupancy is only 42.4%, so a price adjustment could unlock many more bookings.
